name: CIVISTA BANCSHARES, INC.
business: Civista Bancshares, Inc. is a financial holding company whose primary business is conducted through its subsidiary, Civista Bank. Civista Bank offers deposit accounts, loans (commercial real estate, residential mortgage, commercial and agriculture), securities, trust services, and equipment leasing to individuals and businesses primarily in Ohio, Indiana, and Kentucky, with equipment leasing nationwide. Revenue is predominantly derived from interest and fees on loans.
sellsTo: individuals and businesses in Ohio, Indiana, and Kentucky

exposures.sentence: These include personal and commercial checking accounts, retirement accounts, money market accounts, time and savings accounts, safe deposit boxes, wire transfers, access to automated teller services, internet banking, ACH origination, telephone banking, and mobile/digital banking.

FIRST CITIZENS INSURANCE AGENCY, INC. (FCIA) was formed as a wholly owned subsidiary of CBI to allow the Company to participate in commission revenue generated through its third-party insurance agreement.
